title: Merge two sorted lists with length-sum postcondition
description: merge_sorted(a,b) produces a list of length a.length + b.length.
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a merge_sorted(a: List<Int>, b: List<Int>) -> List<Int> function that ensures result.length == a.length + b.length. Merge [1,3,5] and [2,4,6], print each element.
